passives.name: Lead the Way
passives.effects: While moving, generate 7 stacks of ''Momentum'' every {{fd|0.25}} seconds, granting up to {{as|20 '''bonus''' movement speed}} at 100 stacks after {{fd|3.75}} seconds of moving. At '''maximum''' stacks, you leave behind a path briefly that grants {{as|15% of your '''total''' movement speed}} as {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} to allied champions within. Basic attacks consume all stacks. If you are {{tip|melee}} and at '''maximum''' stacks, your next basic attack {{tip|slow|slows}} the target by 50% for 1 second.

effects_structured.raw: While moving, gain 7 Momentum stacks every 0.25s up to 100 stacks.
While moving, Momentum grants up to +20 bonus move speed at max stacks.
At max Momentum, leave a trail that gives allies 15% of your total move speed as bonus move speed.
Basic attacks consume all Momentum stacks.
If melee and at max Momentum, your next basic attack slows the target by 50% for 1s.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Trail duration for the ally movement speed bonus is not specified in the source text.
Verified Momentum timing against page-level source: stack generation cadence is 7 per 0.25s up to 100, with tooltip-level max-stack timing around 3.75s of continuous movement.
Trail branch note: ally movement-speed trail exists only at maximum Momentum and is brief; source text does not publish an exact trail duration value.
